approach_summary: Read the intellij-code-reference SKILL, loaded mcp__idea__* schemas via ToolSearch, probed IntelliJ MCP with get_project_modules (succeeded - 200+ modules indexed). Used search_symbol to locate the OrderWorkflowAuditStrategy class and found the @Bean factory method in OrderAuditAutoConfiguration.java. Ran case-sensitive text searches on both class name and bean name (lower-camel) to find all references. Searched via regex for @Qualifier/@Resource/getBean by-name patterns (none found). Discovered the bean is actually registered into a custom strategy registry (AuditStrategyDispatch) via getBeansOfType + getStrategyName(), not by Spring bean name; the 'name' used to look it up is the string returned from getStrategyName() ('OrderWorkflowAuditStrategy'), referenced from a frontend JS file. Reported file:line for @Bean registration, class definition, strategy self-id, dispatch registry, runtime lookup, and client-side key use.
